session.user: Run `make lint` in /home/runner/work/erk/erk and report the results. If lint fails, report all error messages.
session.assistant: I'll run the lint command and report the results.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run lint checks on the project

session.tool_result:
Exit code 2 make: *** [Makefile:13: lint] Error 1
uv run ruff check I001 [*] Import block is un-sorted or un-formatted --> src/erk/cli/commands/exec/group.py:7:1 | 5 | """ 6 | 7 | / import click 8 | | 9 | | # Import and register all scripts 10 | | from erk.cli.commands.exec.scripts.add_objective_node import add_objective_node 11 | | from erk.cli.commands.exec.scripts.add_plan_label import add_plan_label 12 | | from erk.cli.commands.exec.scripts.add_plan_labels import add_plan_labels 13 | | from erk.cli.commands.exec.scripts.add_pr_labels_cmd import add_pr_labels 14 | | from erk.cli.commands.exec.scripts.add_remote_execution_note import ( 15 | | add_remote_execution_note, 16 | | ) 17 | | from erk.cli.commands.exec.scripts.capture_session_info import ( 18 | | capture_session_info, 19 | | ) 20 | | from erk.cli.commands.exec.scripts.ci_fetch_summaries import ci_fetch_summaries 21 | | from erk.cli.commands.exec.scripts.ci_generate_summaries import ci_generate_summaries 22 | | from erk.cli.commands.exec.scripts.ci_update_pr_body import ci_update_pr_body 23 | | from erk.cli.commands.exec.scripts.ci_verify_autofix import ci_verify_autofix 24 | | from erk.cli.commands.exec.scripts.cleanup_impl_context import cleanup_impl_context 25 | | from erk.cli.commands.exec.scripts.close_pr import ( 26 | | close_pr, 27 | | )

163 | | from erk.cli.commands.exec.scripts.summarize_impl_failure import ( 164 | | summarize_impl_failure, Found 1 error.
session.assistant:
The lint check failed with one error in the file `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/src/erk/cli/commands/exec/group.py`.
**Error Summary:**
- **File:** `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/src/erk/cli/commands/exec/group.py` - **Line:** 7 - **Rule:** `I001` - Import block is un-sorted or un-formatted - **Issue:** The imports are not properly sorted/formatted - **Status:** Fixable with `--fix` option
The error indicates that the import statements at lines 7-185 in the `group.py` file need to be reorganized according to the project's import formatting standards. There is 1 fixable error total.
